Team: # HOW TO USE - Profiles & Status (SEED ONLY)
# This tab is now just the SEED: it names the 6 teams, their profile, and the uniform $2,000 Start Cash. Set once at the start; you do not edit it during play.
# Rows 2-7 (one per team) are read by every Financial Statement via VLOOKUP on column C (Start Cash) - do NOT insert, delete, or reorder them, and keep Start Cash in column C.

# ALL line-item detail now lives in the Statement Items tab (6_Statement_Items.csv): each profile's income, living/lifestyle expenses, net-worth assets, and debts. That is the single source of truth - this tab no longer carries Monthly Income / Expenses / Passive Income / Liability Balance columns.
# To change a profile's starting make-up, edit its rows in Statement Items, not here.
# All figures follow the Rule of Zeroes (multiples of $50 / $100).
